_comment: Encrypted s5 search response. The 'data' field is the base64 ciphertext of the seriesData JSON below, encrypted under AES-128-CBC with no padding. Key/IV derive from md5(uid + ts) then md5(<that> + RESPONSE_SECRET), splitting the resulting 32-char hex into key[0:16] + iv[16:32] (UTF-8 bytes). Verified against the upstream decode path.
